statement:
theorem toNA_run {a : DA State Symbol} {xs : ωSequence Symbol} {ss : ωSequence State} :
    a.toNA.Run xs ss ↔ a.run xs = ss :=
proof_text:
by
  constructor
  · rintro _
    ext n
    induction n <;> grind [NA.Run]
  · grind [NA.Run]

statement:
theorem toNAFinAcc_language_eq {a : DA.FinAcc State Symbol} :
    language a.toNAFinAcc = language a :=
proof_text:
by
  ext xs
  #adaptation_note
  
  constructor
  · simp_all [mem_language a xs, Accepts, toNAFinAcc, toNA, FLTS.toLTS_mtr]
  · intro _
    use a.start
    simp_all [Accepts, toNAFinAcc, toNA, FLTS.toLTS_mtr]

statement:
theorem toNABuchi_language_eq {a : DA.Buchi State Symbol} :
    language a.toNABuchi = language a :=
proof_text:
by
  ext xs; constructor
  #adaptation_note
  
  · simp_all [Accepts, language, toNABuchi]
  · intro h
    use (a.run xs)
    split_ands
    · grind
    · exact Filter.frequently_map.mp h

statement: theorem ret_pure {α} [Zero T] (a : α) : (pure a : TimeM T α).ret = a :=

theorem ret_bind {α β} [Add T] (m : TimeM T α) (f : α → TimeM T β) :
    (m >>= f).ret = (f m.ret).ret :=
theorem ret_map {α β} (f : α → β) (x : TimeM T α) : (f <$> x).ret = f x.ret :=

theorem ret_seqRight {α} (x : TimeM T α) (y : Unit → TimeM T β) [Add T] :
    (SeqRight.seqRight x y).ret = (y ()).ret :=

theorem ret_seqLeft {α} [Add T] (x : TimeM T α) (y : Unit → TimeM T β) :
    (SeqLeft.seqLeft x y).ret = x.ret :=

theorem ret_seq {α β} [Add T] (f : TimeM T (α → β)) (x : Unit → TimeM T α) :
    (Seq.seq f x).ret = f.ret (x ()).ret :=

theorem time_bind {α β} [Add T] (m : TimeM T α) (f : α → TimeM T β) :
    (m >>= f).time = m.time + (f m.ret).time :=
theorem time_pure {α} [Zero T] (a : α) : (pure a : TimeM T α).time = 0 :=
theorem time_map {α β} (f : α → β) (x : TimeM T α) : (f <$> x).time = x.time :=

theorem time_seqRight {α} [Add T] (x : TimeM T α) (y : Unit → TimeM T β) :
    (SeqRight.seqRight x y).time = x.time + (y ()).time :=

theorem time_seqLeft {α} [Add T] (x : TimeM T α) (y : Unit → TimeM T β) :
    (SeqLeft.seqLeft x y).time = x.time + (y ()).time :=

theorem time_seq {α β} [Add T] (f : TimeM T (α → β)) (x : Unit → TimeM T α) :
    (Seq.seq f x).time = f.time + (x ()).time :=
theorem ret_tick (c : T) : (tick c).ret = () :=
theorem time_tick (c : T) : (tick c).time = c :=
lemma buchiCongrParam_surjective : Surjective na.BuchiCongrParam :=
proof_text:
by
  intro q
  let f s t := (q.out ∈ na.pairLang s t, q.out ∈ na.pairViaLang na.accept s t)
  have h : ∃ u, ∀ s t, ((f s t).1 ↔ u ∈ na.pairLang s t) ∧
        ((f s t).2 ↔ u ∈ na.pairViaLang na.accept s t) := by
    use q.out
    grind
  use f
  simp only [BuchiCongrParam, h, ↓reduceDIte]
  rw [← Quotient.out_eq q]
  apply Quotient.sound
  intro s t
  grind

statement: theorem buchiCongruence_fin_index [Finite State] : Finite (Quotient na.BuchiCongruence.eq) :=

lemma buchiCongruence_transfer
    {a : Quotient na.BuchiCongruence.eq} {xl yl : List Symbol} {s t : State}
    (hc : xl ∈ na.BuchiCongruence.eqvCls a) (hc' : yl ∈ na.BuchiCongruence.eqvCls a)
    (hp : xl ∈ na.pairLang s t) : ∃ sl, na.Execution s yl t sl ∧
      ( xl ∈ na.pairViaLang na.accept s t → ∃ r ∈ na.accept, r ∈ sl ) :=
proof_text:
by
  have h_eq : na.BuchiCongruence.eq xl yl := by
    apply Quotient.exact
    #adaptation_note
    
    have : ⟦xl⟧ = a := mem_singleton_iff.mp <| mem_preimage.mp hc
    have : ⟦yl⟧ = a := mem_singleton_iff.mp <| mem_preimage.mp hc'
    grind
  have := h_eq s t
  have h_yl : yl ∈ na.pairLang s t := by grind
  have := LTS.Execution.of_mTr h_yl
  grind [LTS.mem_pairViaLang, LTS.Execution, → LTS.Execution.comp,
    → LTS.Execution.of_mTr]

statement:
theorem mem_buchiFamily [Inhabited Symbol]
    {xs : ωSequence Symbol} {a b : Quotient na.BuchiCongruence.eq} :
    xs ∈ na.buchiFamily (a, b) ↔ ∃ xl, ∃ xls : ωSequence (List Symbol),
      xl ∈ na.BuchiCongruence.eqvCls a ∧ (∀ k, xls k ∈ na.BuchiCongruence.eqvCls b - 1) ∧
      xl ++ω xls.flatten = xs :=

theorem buchiFamily_cover [Inhabited Symbol] [Finite State] :
    ⨆ i, na.buchiFamily i = ⊤ :=
proof_text:
by
  apply mem_ext
  intro xs
  have : Finite (Quotient na.BuchiCongruence.eq) := buchiCongruence_fin_index
  let color (t : Finset ℕ) : Quotient na.BuchiCongruence.eq :=
    if h : t.Nonempty then ⟦ xs.extract (t.min' h) (t.max' h) ⟧ else ⟦ [] ⟧
  obtain ⟨b, ns, h_ns, h_color⟩ := infinite_graph_ramsey color
  obtain ⟨f, h_mono, rfl⟩ := strictMono_of_infinite h_ns
  simp only [ωLanguage.mem_iSup, Prod.exists, ωLanguage.mem_top, iff_true]
  use ⟦ xs.take (f 0) ⟧, b
  apply mem_buchiFamily.mpr
  use xs.take (f 0), xs.drop (f 0) |>.toSegs (f · - f 0)
  #adaptation_note
  
  split_ands
  · rfl
  · intro k
    specialize h_color {f k, f (k + 1)}
    have := @h_mono 0 k
    have := @h_mono k (k + 1)
    simp only [Language.mem_sub_one, toSegs_def]
    split_ands
    · have : b = color {f k, f (k + 1)} := by grind
      simp_all only [extract_drop, color]
      split_ifs with h
      · have : f k ≤ f (k + 1) := by lia
        have : f 0 + (f k - f 0) = f k := by lia
        have : f 0 + (f (k + 1) - f 0) = f (k + 1) := by lia
        simp_all
        rfl
      · simp at h
    · grind
  · grind [Nat.base_zero_strictMono h_mono]

statement:
private lemma frequently_via_accept [Inhabited Symbol]
    {xl : List Symbol} {xls : ωSequence (List Symbol)} {ss : ωSequence State}
    (h_acc : ∃ᶠ (k : ℕ) in atTop, ss k ∈ na.accept)
    (h_exec : na.OmegaExecution ss (xl ++ω xls.flatten))
    (h_xls_p : ∀ (k : ℕ), (xls k).length > 0)
    (f : ℕ → ℕ) (h_f : f = fun k => xl.length + xls.cumLen k)
    (ts : ωSequence State) (h_ts : ts = ωSequence.mk (fun k ↦ ss (f k))) :
    ∃ᶠ (k : ℕ) in atTop, xls k ∈ na.pairViaLang na.accept (ts k) (ts (k + 1)) :=
proof_text:
by
  have hm : StrictMono f := by grind [StrictMono, cumLen_strictMono]
  apply Frequently.mono <| frequently_in_strictMono hm h_acc
  rintro n ⟨k, _, _⟩
  apply LTS.mem_pairViaLang.mpr
  use ss (f n + k), by grind, (xls n).take k, (xls n).drop k
  have := extract_flatten h_xls_p n
  have exec {m n} (h : m ≤ n) :=
    LTS.Execution.to_mTr <| LTS.OmegaExecution.extract_execution h_exec h
  split_ands
  · have h : f n ≤ f n + k := by lia
    specialize exec h
    grind [extract_append_right_right]
  · have h : f n + k ≤ f (n + 1) := by lia
    specialize exec h
    grind [extract_append_right_right]
  · grind only [!List.take_append_drop]

statement:
theorem buchiFamily_saturation [Inhabited Symbol] :
    Saturates (fun i ↦ (na.buchiFamily i).toSet) (language na).toSet :=
proof_text:
by
  rintro ⟨a, b⟩ ⟨xs, h_xs, h_lang⟩ ys h_ys
  obtain ⟨xl, xls, h_xl_c, h_xls_c, rfl⟩ := mem_buchiFamily.mp h_xs
  obtain ⟨yl, yls, h_yl_c, h_yls_c, rfl⟩ := mem_buchiFamily.mp h_ys
  obtain ⟨ss, ⟨h_init, h_exec⟩, h_acc⟩ := h_lang
  let f (k : ℕ) := xl.length + xls.cumLen k
  let ts := ωSequence.mk (fun k ↦ ss (f k))
  have h_xls_p (k : ℕ) : (xls k).length > 0 := by grind [Language.mem_sub_one]
  have h_xls_e (k : ℕ) : xls k ∈ na.pairLang (ts k) (ts (k + 1)) := by
    grind [LTS.OmegaExecution.extract_mTr h_exec (?_ : f k ≤ f (k + 1)), LTS.mem_pairLang,
      extract_append_right_right, add_tsub_cancel_left]
  have h_yls (k : ℕ) := buchiCongruence_transfer ((h_xls_c k).left) ((h_yls_c k).left) (h_xls_e k)
  choose sls h_yls_e h_yls_a using h_yls
  have h_yls_p (k : ℕ) : (yls k).length > 0 := by grind [Language.mem_sub_one]
  obtain ⟨ss1, h_ss1_run, h_ss1_seg⟩ := LTS.OmegaExecution.flatten_execution h_yls_e h_yls_p
  suffices ∃ᶠ (k : ℕ) in atTop, ss1 k ∈ na.accept by
    have h_xl_e : xl ∈ na.pairLang (ss 0) (ts 0) := by
      grind [LTS.OmegaExecution.extract_mTr h_exec (?_ : 0 ≤ xl.length),
        extract_append_zero_right, LTS.mem_pairLang]
    have h_yl_e : yl ∈ na.pairLang (ss 0) (ts 0) := by
      grind [buchiCongruence_transfer h_xl_c h_yl_c h_xl_e, LTS.mem_pairLang, LTS.Execution.to_mTr]
    have h_ss1_ts : ss1 0 = ts 0 := by
      have h : 0 < yls.cumLen 1 - yls.cumLen 0 := by grind
      have : 0 < (sls 0).length := by grind
      have : ss1 0 = (sls 0)[0] := by grind [get_extract (xs := ss1) h]
      have : (sls 0)[0] = ts 0 := h_yls_e 0 |>.choose_spec |>.1
      grind
    obtain ⟨ss2, _, _, _, _⟩ := LTS.OmegaExecution.append h_yl_e h_ss1_run h_ss1_ts
    use ss2
    have := @drop_frequently_iff_frequently _ ss2 na.accept yl.length
    grind [Run.mk]
  apply frequently_atTop.mpr
  intro n
  obtain ⟨m, _, s, _, h_mem⟩ :=
    frequently_atTop.mp ((frequently_via_accept h_acc h_exec h_xls_p f rfl ts rfl).mono h_yls_a) n
  obtain ⟨k, _, _⟩ := List.mem_iff_getElem.mp h_mem
  use yls.cumLen m + k
  suffices ss1 (yls.cumLen m + k) = (sls m)[k] by
    have h_mono := cumLen_strictMono h_yls_p
    have := StrictMono.add_le_nat h_mono m 0
    lia
  obtain ⟨_, _, _, _⟩ := h_yls_e m
  obtain ⟨_, _, _, _⟩ := h_yls_e (m + 1)
  grind =>
   have := @get_extract (xs := ss1)
   have : k < (yls m).length ∨ ¬ k < (yls m).length
   have : k < yls.cumLen (m + 1) - yls.cumLen m ∨ 0 < yls.cumLen (m + 2) - yls.cumLen (m + 1)
   finish

statement:
lemma eq_xor_iff_xor_eq {l : ℕ} (c m k : BitVec l) :
    (c = k ^^^ m) ↔ (c ^^^ m = k) :=

theorem otp_ciphertextDist_eq_uniform (l : ℕ) (m : BitVec l) :
    (PMF.uniformOfFintype (BitVec l)).bind
      (fun k => PMF.pure (k ^^^ m)) =
    PMF.uniformOfFintype (BitVec l) :=

@[simp]
lemma get_def : (get : FreeState σ σ) = .lift .get :=

@[simp]
lemma set_def (s : σ) : (set s : FreeState σ PUnit) = .lift (.set s) :=

theorem toStateM_unique {α : Type u} (g : FreeState σ α → StateM σ α)
    (h : Interprets stateInterp g) : g = toStateM :=

theorem run_toStateM {α : Type u} (comp : FreeState σ α) (s₀ : σ) :
    (toStateM comp).run s₀ = pure (run comp s₀) :=
proof_text:
by
  induction comp generalizing s₀ with
  | pure a => rfl
  | liftBind op cont ih =>
    cases op <;> apply ih

statement:
@[simp]
lemma run_pure (a : α) (s₀ : σ) :
    run (.pure a : FreeState σ α) s₀ = (a, s₀) :=

@[simp]
lemma run_get (k : σ → FreeState σ α) (s₀ : σ) :
    run (liftBind .get k) s₀ = run (k s₀) s₀ :=

@[simp]
lemma run_set (s' : σ) (k : PUnit → FreeState σ α) (s₀ : σ) :
    run (liftBind (.set s') k) s₀ = run (k .unit) s' :=

@[simp]
lemma run_bind (x : FreeState σ α) (f : α → FreeState σ β) (s₀ : σ) :
    run (x.bind f) s₀ = let p := x.run s₀; (f p.1).run p.2 :=
proof_text:
by
  induction x generalizing f s₀ with
  | pure => simp
  | liftBind op cont ih =>
    rw [FreeM.liftBind_bind]
    cases op <;> simp [run, ih]

statement:
theorem run'_toStateM {α : Type u} (comp : FreeState σ α) (s₀ : σ) :
    (toStateM comp).run' s₀ = pure (run' comp s₀) :=

@[simp]
lemma run'_pure (a : α) (s₀ : σ) :
    run' (.pure a : FreeState σ α) s₀ = a :=

@[simp]
lemma run'_get (k : σ → FreeState σ α) (s₀ : σ) :
    run' (liftBind .get k) s₀ = run' (k s₀) s₀ :=

@[simp]
lemma run'_set (s' : σ) (k : PUnit → FreeState σ α) (s₀ : σ) :
    run' (liftBind (.set s') k) s₀ = run' (k .unit) s' :=

@[simp]
lemma run'_bind (x : FreeState σ α) (f : α → FreeState σ β) (s₀ : σ) :
    run' (x.bind f) s₀ = let p := x.run s₀; (f p.1).run' p.2 :=

theorem toWriterT_unique {α : Type u} [Monoid ω] (g : FreeWriter ω α → WriterT ω Id α)
    (h : Interprets writerInterp g) : g = toWriterT :=

@[simp]
lemma tell_def (w : ω) :
    tell w = .lift (.tell w) :=

@[simp]
lemma run_pure [Monoid ω] (a : α) :
    run (.pure a : FreeWriter ω α) = (a, 1) :=

@[simp]
lemma run_bind [Monoid ω] (x : FreeWriter ω α) (f : α → FreeWriter ω β) :
    run (x.bind f) = let p := run x; ((f p.1).run.1, p.2 * (f p.1).run.2) :=
proof_text:
by
  induction x generalizing f with
  | pure => simp
  | liftBind op cont ih =>
    rw [FreeM.liftBind_bind]
    cases op
    simp [run, ih, mul_assoc]

statement:
@[simp]
lemma run_liftBind_tell [Monoid ω] (w : ω) (k : PUnit → FreeWriter ω α) :
    run (liftBind (.tell w) k) = (let (a, w') := run (k .unit); (a, w * w')) :=

theorem run_toWriterT {α : Type u} [Monoid ω] (comp : FreeWriter ω α) :
    (toWriterT comp).run = pure (run comp) :=
proof_text:
by
  ext : 1
  induction comp with
  | pure _ => simp only [toWriterT, liftM_pure, run_pure, pure, WriterT.run]
  | liftBind op cont ih =>
    cases op
    simp only [toWriterT, liftM_liftBind, run_liftBind_tell, Id.run_pure] at *
    rw [ ← ih]
    simp [WriterT.run_bind, writerInterp]

statement:
@[simp]
lemma listen_pure [Monoid ω] (a : α) :
    listen (.pure a : FreeWriter ω α) = .pure (a, 1) :=

@[simp]
lemma listen_liftBind_tell [Monoid ω] (w : ω)
    (k : PUnit → FreeWriter ω α) :
    listen (liftBind (.tell w) k) =
      liftBind (.tell w) (fun _ =>
        listen (k .unit) >>= fun (a, w') =>
          pure (a, w * w')) :=

@[simp]
lemma pass_def [Monoid ω] (m : FreeWriter ω (α × (ω → ω))) :
    pass m = let ((a, f), w) := run m; liftBind (.tell (f w)) fun _ => .pure a :=

theorem toContT_unique {α : Type u} (g : FreeCont r α → ContT r Id α)
    (h : Interprets contInterp g) : g = toContT :=

theorem run_toContT {α : Type u} (comp : FreeCont r α) (k : α → r) :
    (toContT comp).run k = pure (run comp k) :=
proof_text:
by
  induction comp with
  | pure a => rfl
  | liftBind op cont ih =>
    simp only [toContT, FreeM.liftM]
    cases op
    simp only [ContT.run_bind]
    congr with x
    apply ih

statement:
@[simp]
lemma run_pure (a : α) (k : α → r) :
    run (.pure a : FreeCont r α) k = k a :=

@[simp]
lemma run_bind (x : FreeCont r α) (f : α → FreeCont r β) (k : β → r) :
    run (x.bind f) k = run x (fun i => run (f i) k) :=
proof_text:
by
  induction x generalizing k with
  | pure a => rfl
  | liftBind op cont ih =>
    rw [FreeM.liftBind_bind]
    cases op
    simp [run, ih]

statement:
@[simp]
lemma run_liftBind_callCC (g : (α → r) → r)
    (cont : α → FreeCont r β) (k : β → r) :
    run (liftBind (.callCC g) cont) k = g (fun a => run (cont a) k) :=

@[simp]
lemma callCC_def (f : MonadCont.Label α (FreeCont r) β → FreeCont r α) :
    callCC f =
      liftBind (.callCC fun k => run (f ⟨fun x => liftBind (.callCC fun _ => k x) pure⟩) k) pure :=

@[simp]
lemma run_callCC (f : MonadCont.Label α (FreeCont r) β → FreeCont r α) (k : α → r) :
    run (callCC f) k = run (f ⟨fun x => liftBind (.callCC fun _ => k x) pure⟩) k :=

@[simp]
lemma read_def : (read : FreeReader σ σ) = .lift .read :=

theorem toReaderM_unique {α : Type u} (g : FreeReader σ α → ReaderM σ α)
    (h : Interprets readInterp g) : g = toReaderM :=

theorem run_toReaderM {α : Type u} (comp : FreeReader σ α) (s : σ) :
    (toReaderM comp).run s = pure (run comp s) :=
proof_text:
by
  induction comp generalizing s with
  | pure a => rfl
  | liftBind op cont ih =>
    cases op; apply ih

statement:
@[simp]
lemma run_pure (a : α) (s₀ : σ) :
    run (.pure a : FreeReader σ α) s₀ = a :=

@[simp]
lemma run_read (k : σ → FreeReader σ α) (s₀ : σ) :
    run (liftBind .read k) s₀ = run (k s₀) s₀ :=

@[simp]
lemma run_bind (x : FreeReader σ α) (f : α → FreeReader σ β) (s₀ : σ) :
    run (x.bind f) s₀ = run (f <| run x s₀) s₀ :=
proof_text:
by
  induction x generalizing s₀ with
  | pure a => rfl
  | liftBind op cont ih =>
    cases op; apply ih

statement:
theorem run_withReader (f : σ → σ) (m : FreeReader σ α) (s : σ) :
    run (withTheReader σ f m) s = run m (f s) :=
proof_text:
by
  induction m generalizing s with
  | pure a => rfl
  | liftBind op cont ih =>
    cases op
    simpa [withTheReader, instMonadWithReaderOf, run] using (ih (f s) s)

statement:
theorem foldFreeM_pure
    (onValue : α → β)
    (onEffect : {ι : Type u} → F ι → (ι → β) → β)
    (a : α) : foldFreeM onValue onEffect (.pure a) = onValue a :=

theorem foldFreeM_liftBind
    (onValue : α → β)
    (onEffect : {ι : Type u} → F ι → (ι → β) → β)
    (op : F ι) (k : ι → FreeM F α) :
    foldFreeM onValue onEffect (.liftBind op k)
      = onEffect op (fun x => foldFreeM onValue onEffect (k x)) :=

theorem foldFreeM_unique
    (onValue : α → β)
    (onEffect : {ι : Type u} → F ι → (ι → β) → β)
    (h : FreeM F α → β)
    (h_pure : ∀ a, h (.pure a) = onValue a)
    (h_liftBind : ∀ {ι} (op : F ι) (k : ι → FreeM F α),
      h (.liftBind op k) = onEffect op (fun x => h (k x))) :
    h = foldFreeM onValue onEffect :=
proof_text:
by
  funext x
  induction x with
  | pure a =>
    rw [foldFreeM_pure, h_pure]
  | liftBind op k ih =>
    rw [foldFreeM_liftBind, h_liftBind]
    grind

statement: theorem HasFresh.fresh_exists {α : Type u} [HasFresh α] (s : Finset α) : ∃ a, a ∉ s :=

theorem prod_mtr_eq (flts1 : FLTS State1 Label) (flts2 : FLTS State2 Label)
    (s : State1 × State2) (μs : List Label) :
    (flts1.prod flts2).mtr s μs = (flts1.mtr s.fst μs, flts2.mtr s.snd μs) :=
proof_text:
by
  induction μs generalizing s <;> grind

statement:
@[scoped grind _=_]
lemma body_let : (let' t₁ t₂).LC ↔ t₁.LC ∧ t₂.body :=
proof_text:
by
  constructor <;> intro h <;> cases h
  case mp.let' L t₁_lc h => exact ⟨t₁_lc, L, h⟩
  case mpr.intro body =>
    obtain ⟨_, _⟩ := body
    grind [LC.let' <| free_union Var]

statement:
@[scoped grind _=_]
lemma body_case : (case t₁ t₂ t₃).LC ↔ t₁.LC ∧ t₂.body ∧ t₃.body :=
proof_text:
by
  constructor <;> intro h
  case mp => cases h with | case L t₁_lc h₂ h₃ => exact ⟨t₁_lc, ⟨L, h₂⟩, ⟨L, h₃⟩⟩
  case mpr =>
    obtain ⟨_, ⟨_, _⟩, ⟨_, _⟩⟩ := h
    grind [LC.case <| free_union Var]

statement:
@[scoped grind <=]
lemma open_tm_body (body : t₁.body) (lc : t₂.LC) : (t₁ ^ᵗᵗ t₂).LC :=
proof_text:
by
  cases body
  grind [fresh_exists <| free_union [fv_tm] Var, subst_tm_lc, open_tm_subst_tm_intro]

statement:
@[grind →]
lemma Value.lc {t : Term Var} (val : t.Value) : t.LC :=
lemma Red.lc {t t' : Term Var} (red : t ⭢βᵛ t') : t.LC ∧ t'.LC :=
proof_text:
by
  induction red
  case abs lc _ | tabs lc _ =>
    split_ands
    · grind
    · cases lc
      grind [
        fresh_exists <| free_union [fv_tm, fv_ty] Var, subst_tm_lc,
        subst_ty_lc, open_tm_subst_tm_intro, open_ty_subst_ty_intro]
  all_goals grind

statement: theorem perm (ht : Γ ⊢ t ∶ τ) (hperm : Γ.Perm Δ) : Δ ⊢ t ∶ τ :=
proof_text:
by
  induction ht generalizing Δ
  case abs ih =>
    constructor
    intros x mem
    exact ih x mem (by simp_all)
  all_goals grind

statement: lemma weaken_aux (der : Γ ++ Δ ⊢ t ∶ τ) : (Γ ++ Θ ++ Δ)✓ → (Γ ++ Θ ++ Δ) ⊢ t ∶ τ :=
proof_text:
by
  generalize eq : Γ ++ Δ = Γ_Δ at der
  induction der generalizing Γ Δ Θ with
  | abs xs => grind [Typing.abs (xs ∪ (Γ ++ Θ ++ Δ).dom), List.nodupKeys_cons]
  | _ => grind

statement: lemma weaken (der : Γ ⊢ t ∶ τ) (ok : (Γ ++ Δ)✓) : Γ ++ Δ ⊢ t ∶ τ :=

@[scoped grind →]
lemma lc (der : Γ ⊢ t ∶ τ) : t.LC :=
proof_text:
by
  induction der <;> constructor
  case abs ih => exact ih
  all_goals grind

statement:
lemma subst_aux (h : Δ ++ ⟨x, σ⟩ :: Γ ⊢ t ∶ τ) (der : Γ ⊢ s ∶ σ) :
    Δ ++ Γ ⊢ t[x := s] ∶ τ :=
proof_text:
by
  generalize eq : Δ ++ ⟨x, σ⟩ :: Γ = Θ at h
  induction h generalizing Γ Δ der
  case app => grind
  case var x' _ ok _ =>
    subst eq
    cases ((List.perm_nodupKeys (by simp)).mp ok : (⟨x, σ⟩ :: Δ ++ Γ)✓)
    case cons =>
    observe perm : (Γ ++ Δ).Perm (Δ ++ Γ)
    by_cases h : x = x'
    case neg => grind
    case pos => grind [(weaken der ?_).perm perm]
  case abs =>
    grind [Typing.abs <| free_union Var, subst_open_var _ _ _ _ ?_ der.lc]

statement:
lemma typing_subst_head (weak : ⟨x, σ⟩ :: Γ ⊢ t ∶ τ) (der : Γ ⊢ s ∶ σ) :
    Γ ⊢ (t [x := s]) ∶ τ :=

proof_text:
by
  have ⟨fresh, _⟩ := fresh_exists <| free_union [Term.fv] Var
  grind [subst_intro fresh _ _ ?_ der.lc, typing_subst_head]

statement:
@[scoped grind →]
lemma step_lc_r (hR : ∀ {M' N'}, R M' N' → LC N') (step : Xi R M N) : LC N :=
proof_text:
by
  induction step with
  | base h => exact hR h
  | abs xs _ ih =>
    constructor
    exact ih
  | _ => grind

statement:
@[scoped grind ←]
lemma multiApp_lc : LC (M.multiApp Ns) ↔ LC M ∧ (∀ N ∈ Ns, LC N) :=
proof_text:
by
  induction Ns with grind [cases LC]

statement:
@[scoped grind ←]
lemma step_multiApp_l (steps : M ⭢βᶠ M') (lc_Ns : ∀ N ∈ Ns, LC N) :
    M.multiApp Ns ⭢βᶠ M'.multiApp Ns :=

lemma steps_multiApp_l (steps : M ↠βᶠ M') (lc_Ns : ∀ N ∈ Ns, LC N) :
    M.multiApp Ns ↠βᶠ M'.multiApp Ns :=

@[scoped grind ←]
lemma step_multiApp_r (steps : Ns ⭢lβᶠ Ns') (lc_M : LC M) : M.multiApp Ns ⭢βᶠ M.multiApp Ns' :=
lemma steps_multiApp_r (steps : Ns ↠lβᶠ Ns') (lc_M : LC M) : M.multiApp Ns ↠βᶠ M.multiApp Ns' :=

lemma invert_abs_multiApp_st {Ps} {M N Q : Term Var}
  (h_red : multiApp (M.abs.app N) Ps ⭢βᶠ Q) :
    (∃ M', M.abs ⭢βᶠ Term.abs M' ∧ Q = multiApp (M'.abs.app N) Ps) ∨
    (∃ N', N ⭢βᶠ N' ∧ Q = multiApp (M.abs.app N') Ps) ∨
    (∃ Ps', Ps ⭢lβᶠ Ps' ∧ Q = multiApp (M.abs.app N) Ps') ∨
    (Q = multiApp (M ^ N) Ps) :=
proof_text:
by
  induction Ps generalizing M N Q with
  | nil => grind [cases Xi]
  | cons P Ps ih =>
    generalize Heq : (M.abs.app N).multiApp Ps = Q'
    have : ∀ P', Q'.app P' = (M.abs.app N).multiApp (P' :: Ps) := by grind
    rw [multiApp, Heq] at h_red
    cases h_red with
    | base => cases Ps <;> grind
    | appR => grind [→ ListFullBeta.cons]
    | appL => grind

statement:
lemma invert_abs_multiApp_mst {Ps} {M N Q : Term Var}
  (h_red : multiApp (M.abs.app N) Ps ↠βᶠ Q) :
    ∃ M' N' Ns', M.abs ↠βᶠ M'.abs ∧ N ↠βᶠ N' ∧ Ps ↠lβᶠ Ns' ∧
                 (Q = multiApp (M'.abs.app N') Ns' ∨
     (multiApp (M.abs.app N) Ps ↠βᶠ multiApp (M' ^ N') Ns' ∧
                                     multiApp (M' ^ N') Ns' ↠βᶠ Q)) :=
proof_text:
by
  induction h_red with
  | refl => grind
  | tail _ step ih =>
    obtain ⟨_, _, _, _, _, _, h⟩ := ih
    rcases h with heq | _
    · subst heq
      grind [invert_abs_multiApp_st step]
    · grind [Relation.ReflTransGen.single]

statement: lemma multiApp_step_lc_r (step : Ns ⭢lβᶠ Ns') : ∀ N ∈ Ns', LC N :=
lemma multiApp_steps_lc (step : Ns ↠lβᶠ Ns') (H : ∀ N ∈ Ns, LC N) : ∀ N ∈ Ns', LC N :=
